# smbaios

> smbaios is a sovereign, MIT-licensed tool in the AI-Native Solutions estate. Listed on FallMarket. Ed25519-signed. Runs on your infrastructure.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/smbaios/

## What it is

A sovereign tool that ships as source, runs offline, and outlasts the vendor. Part of a 1330+ listing catalog under @ai-native-solutions/*.

## Owner and steward

- Organization: AI-Native Solutions
- Website: https://ai-nativesolutions.com
- Marketplace: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/
- Registry entry: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/listing.html?id=smbaios
